chatWithYourSources.title: Chat with your sources
chatWithYourSources.description: Ask questions and get clear answers based only on the material you upload, with citations that point back to the exact passage.

anyFormatOneKnowledgeBase.title: Any format, one knowledge base
anyFormatOneKnowledgeBase.description: Add PDFs, paste a URL, or drop in raw text. Everything is indexed together so you can search across it all.

audioOverviews.title: Audio overviews
audioOverviews.description: Turn your sources into a natural, podcast-style conversation you can listen to instead of reading.

instantSummariesStudyGuides.title: Instant summaries & study guides
instantSummariesStudyGuides.description: Create FAQs, briefing docs, or study guides from your sources automatically. No prompting required.

SignInPage.title: Welcome back
SignInPage.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue
